C2I.Setting.AutoAssignOnCreate.Name: Auto-assign Conan item icons on create/import
C2I.Setting.AutoAssignOnCreate.Hint: When enabled, newly created world items and actor items receive a Conan icon automatically. Imported compendium items are treated as valid targets.
C2I.Setting.OverwriteCustomIcons.Name: Overwrite custom icons during migration
C2I.Setting.OverwriteCustomIcons.Hint: When enabled, the manual migration also replaces non-generic item images. Leave disabled to preserve custom artwork and only replace generic or previously auto-assigned icons.
C2I.Setting.RunMigrationNow.Name: Run icon migration now
C2I.Setting.RunMigrationNow.Hint: Enable this once to update existing world items and embedded actor items. After editing data/icon-overrides.json, use Reload Application before running the migration. The setting resets automatically after the migration finishes.
C2I.Notification.MigrationComplete: Conan item icon migration complete. Updated {world} world items and {actorItems} actor items across {actors} actors.
C2I.Notification.MigrationFailed: Conan item icon migration failed. Check the browser console for details.
C2I.Menu.ResetIcons.Name: Reset Icons to System Default
C2I.Menu.ResetIcons.Label: Open Reset Dialog
C2I.Menu.ResetIcons.Hint: Open a dialog to restore the selected item types to their Conan system default icons across world items, actor items, and unlinked token items.
C2I.ResetDialog.Title: Reset Icons to System Default
C2I.ResetDialog.Content: Select which item types should be restored to their Conan system default icons.
C2I.Notification.ResetNoneSelected: Select at least one item type.
C2I.Notification.ResetComplete: Conan system icon reset complete. Updated {world} world items and {actorItems} actor items across {actors} actors. Unresolved items: {unresolved}.
C2I.Notification.ResetFailed: Resetting icons to Conan system defaults failed. Check the browser console for details.
